title: Nouuur_ pack
description: The pack of @Nqouir has a very distinct style that clearly moves away from the default Minecraft look. Instead of sticking to vanilla, it gives the game a completely fresh and unique appearance.
body: The pack of @Nqouir has a very distinct style that clearly moves away from the default Minecraft look. Instead of sticking to vanilla, it gives the game a completely fresh and unique appearance. The textures feel more custom and stylized, making everything stand out much more.
